Series.title: Series
Series.description: Represents a drama series, containing core information and linking to its components like seasons, cast, and genres.

title.description: The main title of the drama series.

description.description: A detailed summary or synopsis of the series.

releaseYear.description: The year the series was first released.

status.description: The current production status of the series (e.g., 'ongoing', 'completed', 'upcoming', 'on-hiatus').

coverUrl.description: URL to the series' primary cover art.

genres.description: An array of genre names associated with this series.

tags.description: An array of keyword tags for discoverability.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the series record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the series record was last updated.

isFeatured.description: Whether the series is featured on the homepage (Hero Carousel).

isPremium.description: Whether the series is marked as Premium (shows badge).

freeEpisodesCount.description: Number of episodes that are free to watch.

language.description: The primary language of the series content, represented by an ISO 639-1 code.

tmdbId.description: The Movie Database (TMDB) ID for this series.

Episode.title: Episode
Episode.description: Represents an individual episode within a series.

seriesId.description: Reference to the Series this episode belongs to.

episodeInSeason.description: The sequential number of the episode within its series.

videoSources.description: An array of video sources for different qualities.

url.description: The URL to the video file for this quality.

Category.title: Category
Category.description: Defines categories or genres for drama series.

showOnHomepage.description: Whether this category should be shown on the homepage.

UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Stores public-facing profile information for a user.

photoURL.description: URL of the user's profile picture.

coins.description: The number of coins the user has.

isVip.description: Whether the user is a VIP.

disabled.description: Whether the user's account is disabled.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

seriesId.description: The ID of the favorited series.

favoritedAt.description: Timestamp when the series was favorited.

ContactMessage.title: Contact Message
ContactMessage.description: Represents a message submitted through the contact form.

isRead.description: Whether the message has been read by an admin.

CustomPage.title: Custom Page
CustomPage.description: A custom page with static content.

Purchase.title: Purchase
Purchase.description: Represents a successful coin pack purchase.

userId.description: The ID of the user who made the purchase.

userEmail.description: The email of the user for reference.

userName.description: The name of the user who made the purchase for reference.

packId.description: The ID of the purchased coin pack.

packName.description: The name of the purchased coin pack.

AnalyticsData.title: Analytics Data
AnalyticsData.description: Represents a single user visit for analytics.

AdminProfile.title: Admin Profile
AdminProfile.description: Stores the credentials for the admin panel user.

passwordSalt.description: The salt for the admin password hash.

displayName.description: The name to display in the UI.

Report.title: Report
Report.description: Represents a user-submitted report about content.

reporterUid.description: The UID of the user who submitted the report.

reporterEmail.description: The email of the reporting user.

reportedContentRef.description: A reference to the reported content (e.g., 'series/seriesId' or 'episodes/episodeId').

reportedContentTitle.description: The title of the reported content for easy identification.

seriesId.description: The ID of the series related to the report.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the report was submitted.

/series/{seriesId}.description: Collection for all drama series. Publicly readable.

/episodes/{episodeId}.description: Collection for all episodes. Publicly readable.

/categories/{categoryId}.description: Collection for all content categories. Publicly readable.

/pages/{pageId}.description: Collection for custom static pages. Publicly readable.

/contacts/{contactId}.description: Collection for contact form submissions. Writable by anyone, readable by admins.

/purchases/{purchaseId}.description: Root collection for all successful purchases for easy querying and analytics. Writable by users, readable by admins.

/users/{userId}.description: Collection for user profile data. Only the user can read/write their own profile.

/users/{userId}/favorites/{seriesId}.description: Subcollection for a user's favorite series. Document ID is the series ID.

/users/{userId}/history/{seriesId}.description: Subcollection for a user's watch history. Document ID is the series ID.

/users/{userId}/unlockedEpisodes/{episod.description: Subcollection for episodes a user has unlocked.

/users/{userId}/coinTransactions/{transa.description: Subcollection for a user's coin transactions.

/users/{userId}/adWatches/{dateId}.description: Tracks the number of ads a user has watched on a given day.

/admins/{userId}.description: Collection to designate administrators. Document ID is the user's UID.

/settings/storage.description: Singleton document for media storage settings.

/settings/admin.description: Singleton document for the admin user credentials.

/analytics/{analyticId}.description: Collection to store user visit analytics.

/reports/{reportId}.description: Collection for user-submitted content reports. Writable by authenticated users, readable by admins.
